other_observers: Tony Leukering Rachel Hopper Glenn Walbeck many others; Ted Floyd found this bird on 11/26/2006
description: This is a large brownish bird... A pelican  Whose bill holds more than its belly can. Food for a week It stores in its beak. But I don't know how the hell he can.  Huge bill with gular pouch.  Short stout gray brown legs with large webbed feet.Behaviors: Slept the entire time.Call: nonePlumage: 1st or 2nd year
